# sentinel-ai

> A self-hosted, 24/7 AI security agent that monitors Linux infrastructure, detects threats in real time, and sends instant alerts to WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, and email — powered by Claude AI.

## What it does
- Monitors SSH brute force, port scans, web scans, suspicious processes
- Uses Claude AI to analyze threats, score risk, and generate remediation steps
- Sends instant alerts to WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, and email
- Runs automated OWASP/NIST/ISO 27001 compliance checks
- Generates audit reports in HTML/JSON
- Self-hosted — no data leaves your server
- One-line install: `curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Nasimashaoz/sentinel-ai/main/install.sh | bash`

## Requirements
- Python 3.10+
- Linux (Debian/Ubuntu/RHEL)
- Claude API key (for AI analysis)
- Optional: Telegram bot, Twilio (WhatsApp), Slack webhook

## Source
https://github.com/Nasimashaoz/sentinel-ai
